519.reason: [Error: When parsing a brace-enclosed initializer list starting with '{' (LBRACE), the code incorrectly creates an LBRACKNode (for '[') instead of an LBRACENode (for '{'), which will cause incorrect AST construction and potentially wrong error reporting or output]
